Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n## Quick PK/model status note\n\nBased on the current dosing configuration alone, the parameters look internally consistent and there are **no obvious red flags** in the listed PK values. Clearance values appear directionally consistent with patient size, and the accompanying clinical notes suggest stability or response in CU-001 and CU-002.\n\n**Watch item:** CU-003 should be monitored more closely because this is a new enrollment with the shortest dosing interval (q2w) and the highest listed dose intensity.\n\n## Caveat\n\nThis is a configuration-based summary only and not a substitute for a fresh model validation run or toxicity review.", recipients="") ]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and drafted a summary for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary:

- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Source config:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`
- **Last updated:** 2026-03-28

### Dosing summary
| Patient | Weight | Dose | Calculated dose/admin | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|
| **CU-001** | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | **1.86 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min |
| **CU-002** | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | **1.09 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min |
| **CU-003** | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

### Clinical notes
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

### PK model stability
From the current config, **everything looks generally stable** — no obvious inconsistencies in the listed PK parameters. The clearance values look reasonable relative to patient size, and the notes for CU-001 and CU-002 are reassuring.

Only mild watch item:
- **CU-003** deserves closer monitoring since it’s a new enrollment and on the more frequent **q2w** schedule.

I also saved this as a report for easy forwarding. If you want, I can format it into a short email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
